title: Finch: request stop
description: An outbound HTTP request via Finch completed (success, streaming, or error). By default only the hostname is captured; enable full_url in insights_config to include the full path.

url.description: Full URL excluding query params. Only present when full_url: true is configured.

status.description: HTTP response status code. Present on successful (non-streaming) responses.

streaming.description: True for streaming requests where no status code is available.

error.description: Error message if the request failed.

request_id.description: Request ID from the current EventContext.
